name: complex-pipe-modification
instruction: Modify `summarize` to add two new steps in the pipe chain: 1) After the existing pipe, add `list.filter` to remove items with `price <= 0`. 2) After reverse, add `list.take(xs, 3)` to keep only the first 3 items. Keep `total_value` unchanged.
layer3_hint: Available: `list.take(xs, n)` returns the first n elements. `list.filter(xs, fn(x) => bool)` filters elements. Both work in pipe chains: `|> list.take(3)` or `|> list.filter(fn(p) => p.price > 0)`
